betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Grinder§f

§aProcess raw meat into ground meat and grind grains into flour.§f

The §bGrinder§f converts raw meats into ground variants and grains into flour, plus processes spices and seasonings. It is the primary food processing machine in HarvestCraft and is required for most meal recipes.

§6Crafting§f:
§eShaped recipe:§f
§b• 6× Iron Ingots§f (surrounding)
§b• 1× Iron Sword§f (top-center)
§b• 1× Redstone Repeater§f (bottom-center)

§6Grinder Recipes§f:
§b• Raw Meats§f → §e2× Ground Meat§f (Chicken, Beef, Pork, Mutton, Rabbit, Turkey, Venison, Duck — each produces its own ground variant)
§b• Raw Fish§f → §e2× Ground Fish§f (all vanilla and HarvestCraft fish species)
§b• Wheat / Potato / Barley / Oats / Rice / Rye / Peas / Soybean / Bean§f → §e2× Flour§f
§b• Almond / Coconut / Banana / Chestnut§f → §e2× Flour§f
§b• Seaweed§f → §eSalt§f + Veggie Bait
§b• Peppercorn§f → §eBlack Pepper§f + Veggie Bait
§b• Nutmeg§f → §eGround Nutmeg§f + Grain Bait
§b• Cinnamon§f → §eGround Cinnamon§f + Grain Bait

§6Operation§f:
§9Right-click§f the Grinder to open its GUI. Place the source item in the input slot. The Grinder processes each item in §e125 ticks§f (≈§e6.25 seconds§f). Output appears in the §ebottom two slots§f — the primary output (e.g., ground meat) goes to the left, and any secondary output (e.g., bait) goes to the right.

§6Automation§f:
The Grinder is fully automatable. Items can be piped in from the top and extracted from the bottom using §bhoppers§f, §bitemducts§f, or §bdrawers§f. The Grinder has §e3 inventory slots§f (1 input + 2 output). It drops its inventory when broken.

§eTip§f: Build a Grinder early — it produces §bGround Meat§f (essential for burgers, sausages, and many meals) and §bFlour§f (essential for baking). Pair with a §bPresser§f for a complete food processing line.
